SELECT geohashDecode(hash_str) AS res FROM geohash_data;
SELECT geohashDecode(hash_str) AS res FROM geohash_data WHERE hash_str != '';
SELECT geohashDecode('ezs42') AS decoded_geohash, hash_str FROM geohash_data;
SELECT (SELECT geohashDecode(hash_str) FROM geohash_data WHERE hash_str = 'u4pruyd') AS lon_lat, g.hash_str FROM geohash_data g;
SELECT d.hash_str, geohashDecode(d.hash_str) FROM (SELECT hash_str FROM geohash_data) AS d WHERE length(d.hash_str) BETWEEN 1 AND 12;
SELECT g.hash_str, geohashDecode(g.hash_str) AS decoded_geohash FROM geohash_data g WHERE g.hash_str IN (SELECT hash_str FROM geohash_data WHERE length(hash_str) > 3);
SELECT g1.hash_str AS hash, g2.hash_str AS other_hash, geohashDecode(g1.hash_str) AS decoded_lon_lat FROM geohash_data g1 JOIN geohash_data g2 ON g1.hash_str = g2.hash_str WHERE g1.hash_str != '';
SELECT g.hash_str, geohashDecode(g.hash_str) FROM geohash_data g ORDER BY length(g.hash_str) DESC;
SELECT geohashDecode('gcpuv') AS res, g.hash_str FROM geohash_data g WHERE g.hash_str IN (SELECT hash_str FROM geohash_data LIMIT 1);
